history.content: Hey prom can you go ahead and run a quick web search for me on openclaw - and its latest updates, and also id like you to go ahead and go on my X and like a post about openclaw, and id also like you to write a note saying testing testing for me -

Perfect! All three tasks are done:

**✅ Web Search Results:**
Found several updates on OpenClaw:
- Latest blog and release notes available at openclaws.io and openclaw.com.au
- **OpenClaw 2026.3.28** is a major update (March 28) featuring 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, and 82 bug fixes
- GitHub releases show CLI improvements like preflight checks for Node.js version compatibility before updates
- `openclaw update` command can detect install type and fetch the latest version automatically

**✅ Note Saved:**
"testing testing" has been logged to your intraday notes.

**✅ Post Liked:**
Liked @smolemaru's post about the Android assistant in the new OpenClaw release.

All set!
do that same thing - but this time use background agents to run the tasks in parallel -
